description:
The quiz assesses knowledge of modern CSS concepts through multiple‑choice questions, gauging both basic and advanced proficiency with a light, encouraging tone. It targets developers who want to evaluate their CSS skills for résumé relevance, offering a moderate difficulty level that balances challenge with approachable teaching.
Topics: CSS fundamentals, Modern layout techniques (Flexbox, Grid), Responsive design, CSS preprocessors and variables, Browser compatibility
Audience: Front‑end developers, web designers, and software engineers looking to validate and showcase their CSS expertise.
